title: Weather: Mild Monday expected
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South African Weather Service has forecast calm and hot weather in most parts of the country. The Garden Route and Karoo can expect cool to mild temperatures on Monday, 25 August.

No warnings were issued for today, after a weekend of damaging waves, leading to localised damage to coastal infrastructure between Alexander Bay and Port Alfred.


> Regional weather forecast for today:


Western CapePartly cloudy and cool to cold, becoming fine in the west from the afternoon. The wind along the coast will be fresh to strong south-easterly but light westerly along the south coast at first, becoming moderate south-westerly from the afternoon.

The expected UVB sunburn index: Moderate

Western half of the Eastern CapePartly cloudy and cool, becoming fine in the west by the afternoon. The wind along the coast will be moderate south-westerly, becoming fresh in the afternoon.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapeCloudy south of the escarpment with light rain along the Wild coast and adjacent interior in the morning, otherwise partly cloudy and cool. The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh south-westerly.


> Expected temperatures for Monday 25 August:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
